data.content: Approved implementation review. The terminal-manager change now sets rolledBack=true only when the post-exit state required rollback and invariant enforcement succeeded; queue-state error exits remain rolledBack=false while still recording failure and retry availability. I verified the touched-file lint command, targeted unit tests for terminal-manager error retry and agent outcome stats (18/18 passing), bunx tsc --noEmit, and bun run build.
